# Claude Buddy

> Claude Buddy is a free web-based pixel companion generator built on Claude Code's hidden gacha system. Enter any name or your Claude Code user ID and hatch a unique, deterministic pixel creature.

## What is Claude Buddy?

Claude Buddy is a fan-made tool that generates unique pixel art companions from Claude Code's built-in buddy system. Each buddy is deterministically generated from a name hash — the same name always produces the same buddy. There are 12 species across 5 rarity tiers (Common, Uncommon, Rare, Epic, Legendary), with a 1-in-20 chance of a shiny variant.

## How It Works

1. Enter any name or sync your Claude Code user ID
2. The name is hashed to deterministically select a species, rarity, stats, palette, and sprite
3. The buddy is drawn pixel-by-pixel on a 16x16 grid with a CRT-style animation
4. You can export the buddy as a PNG or install it as your Claude Code statusline companion

## Species List

- **Common (45%):** Blobbit, Gruntle, Pebblix, Snorb
- **Uncommon (30%):** Flickmouse, Mosscap, Dustbunni
- **Rare (15%):** Glimworm, Thornpup
- **Epic (7%):** Voidmaw, Crystalfin
- **Legendary (3%):** Nebulynx

## Stats

Each buddy has four stats (0-100): Vibe, Chaos, Focus, and Luck.

## Features

- Deterministic generation: same name = same buddy, always
- 12 unique species with distinct pixel art sprites
- 5 rarity tiers with weighted probability
- Shiny variants (5% chance) with alternate color palettes
- Export to PNG
- Install as Claude Code statusline companion
- Shareable URLs with OpenGraph preview images
- Sync with your Claude Code user ID

## URL

https://claudebuddy.me

## Built By

Basement Team — https://basementbrowser.com
